verses.text: Mordecai rises to be second only to the king, great among the Jews, seeking his people's welfare and speaking peace to all his seed. The once-scorned Jew ends in honour and usefulness. God exalts the faithful, and the truly great use their power for the good of others, not themselves.

Mordecai rises to be second only to the king, great among the Jews, seeking his people's welfare and speaking peace to all his seed. The once-scorned Jew ends in honour and usefulness. God exalts the faithful, and the truly great use their power for the good of others, not themselves.
